name: Wilkinson VS50
description: Classic 2-point pivot knife-edge tremolo with precision machined hardened steel base plate and locked-down stainless steel saddles

name: Wilkinson VSVG
description: Vintage-feel 2-point tremolo with 5+1 knife edge system; stagger-drilled block and spring steel bent saddles for classic vintage tone

name: Wilkinson VS100N
description: Original 1986 VS100N 2-pivot knife-edge vibrato with half-moon locating pivot for exceptional tuning stability

name: Wilkinson WVP
description: Vintage 6-screw synchronized tremolo with barrel nickel-plated bent steel saddles and stagger-drilled block; balances vintage values and modern stability

name: Wilkinson WVPB
description: Vintage 6-screw synchronized tremolo; brass saddle variant of the WVP offering classic vintage tone

name: Wilkinson WVS50IIK
description: Platinum series 2-point tremolo inspired by the VS100N; virtually friction-free knife-edge pivot with total control arm system

name: Wilkinson WT3
description: Pro series T-style 4-hole hardtail bridge with revolutionary compensated saddle design for precise intonation; preferred by boutique brands

name: Wilkinson WTB
description: Platinum series Telecaster ashtray hardtail bridge with three compensated brass saddles; supports top-load or string-through-body mounting

name: Wilkinson WTBS
description: Classic 3-saddle Telecaster hardtail bridge with compensated brass saddles; 54mm string spacing for rich vintage tone

name: Wilkinson GTB
description: Adjustable intonated wraparound bridge/tailpiece for Les Paul style guitars; individually adjustable compensated saddles including G and B
